description: Digitize the legacy patient intake form for Sarah CONNOR into MedinTux using the information from ~/Desktop/patient_intake_form.txt. Create a patient record with the demographic details (DOB: 12/05/1965, Address: 1984 Cyberdyne Ave, 75012 Paris) and document a clinical note transcribing the medical history and allergies, ensuring the terms 'Appendicectomy', 'Fracture Tibia', 'Latex', and 'Penicillin' are included.
